allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Speech
\\$s = New-Object System.Speech.Synthesis.SpeechSynthesizer
\\$s.Rate = 0
\\$s.Volume = 100

\\$s.SetOutputToWaveFile\('C:\\\\Users\\\\anura\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\aiTools\\\\my-video\\\\public\\\\voice\\\\question.wav'\)
\\$s.Speak\('What is the largest planet in our solar system?'\)

\\$s.SetOutputToWaveFile\('C:\\\\Users\\\\anura\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\aiTools\\\\my-video\\\\public\\\\voice\\\\options.wav'\)
\\$s.Speak\('Your choices are. A: Earth. B: Saturn. C: Jupiter. D: Mars.'\)

\\$s.SetOutputToWaveFile\('C:\\\\Users\\\\anura\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\aiTools\\\\my-video\\\\public\\\\voice\\\\answer.wav'\)
\\$s.Speak\('You are correct! Yeah! Amazing job! The answer is Jupiter! You are a superstar!'\)

\\$s.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host 'Done'
")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Speech
\\$s = New-Object System.Speech.Synthesis.SpeechSynthesizer
\\$s.GetInstalledVoices\(\) | ForEach-Object { \\$_.VoiceInfo | Select-Object Name, Gender, Culture, Age }
\\$s.Dispose\(\)
")
Bash(python -m edge_tts --voice "$VOICE" --text "A: Earth.  B: Saturn.  C: Jupiter.  D: Mars." --write-media "$BASE/options.mp3")
Bash(python -m edge_tts --voice "$VOICE" --text "You are correct! Yeah! Amazing! The answer is Jupiter! You are a superstar!" --write-media "$BASE/answer.mp3")
Bash(python -m edge_tts --voice "$VOICE" --text "You are correct! Yeah! Jupiter is the answer!" --write-media "$BASE/answer.mp3")
Bash(python -m edge_tts --voice "$VOICE" --text "You are correct! Amazing! The answer is Jupiter. You are a superstar!" --write-media "$BASE/answer.mp3")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \(Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess \\$_.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object LocalPort -eq 3001\) } | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'killed'")
